    CountryModel - Class in com.risk.model
    "CountryModel" represents a country's properties such as name, position, continent name that it belongs to, countries that it connected to, owner (player who owns it) name, Number of armies in, and color.
    CountryModel() - Constructor for class com.risk.model.CountryModel
    Default constructor.
    CountryModel(String, int, int, String, List, int, String) - Constructor for class com.risk.model.CountryModel
    Constructor of CountryModel with parameters.

    Getter method that provides us a map model corresponding to a map name.
    SwingConnectCountryView - Class in com.risk.view.impl.swing
    "SwingConnectCountryView" Class displays a view to enable the players to connect a country to any other one during map creation.
    SwingConnectCountryView(GameMapModel) - Constructor for class com.risk.view.impl.swing.SwingConnectCountryView
    Constructor method of SwingConnectCountryView.
    SwingCreateContinentView - Class in com.risk.view.impl.swing
    "SwingCreateContinentView" class represents a view object for creating continent Properties are containing labels, text fields, buttons, a pane, and a panel
    SwingCreateContinentView() - Constructor for class com.risk.view.impl.swing.SwingCreateContinentView
    Construction of SwingCreateContinentView
    SwingCreateCountryView - Class in com.risk.view.impl.swing
    "SwingCreateCountryView" class represents a view object for creating a country view Properties are containing labels, text fields, buttons, combo-boxes, a pane, and a panel.
    SwingCreateCountryView(List<ContinentsModel>) - Constructor for class com.risk.view.impl.swing.SwingCreateCountryView
    Construction of "SwingCreateCountryView".
    SwingCreateCountryView.CountryViewRenderer - Class in com.risk.view.impl.swing
    Inside, getter method that provides us a map model corresponding to a map name.
    SwingEditContinentView - Class in com.risk.view.impl.swing
    "SwingEditContinentView" represents a view object for editing a continent It contains Labels, text fields, and buttons

    Constructor of SwingEditContinentView
